svg.title: Four-cluster DC/DR topology with clean data-flow arrows
svg.desc: DC site: the DC main cluster has Pod 1 primary streaming to Pod 2 and archiving WAL down to the DC bucket; the DC bucket replays down into Pod 3 in the DC standby cluster. DR site: the DR bucket replays up into the DR main cluster where Pod 4 lead streams to Pod 5, and replays down into Pod 6 in the DR standby cluster. The DC and DR buckets sync two-way across the center, which makes the setup reversible on failover.
svg.text: two-way bucket sync — reversible on failover
